queries.account: { account { id name email channels { id name service } } }
queries.channels: { account { channels { id name service serverUrl } } }
queries.posts: query Posts($input: PostsInput!, $first: Int, $after: String) { posts(input: $input, first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id text status } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
queries.post: query Post($input: PostInput!) { post(input: $input) { id text status } }

mutations.create_post: mutation CreatePost($input: CreatePostInput!) { createPost(input: $input) { ... on PostActionPayload { post { id text status } } } }
mutations.delete_post: mutation DeletePost($input: DeletePostInput!) { deletePost(input: $input) { ... on DeletePostPayload { success } } }
